untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external fundamental value estimates and information confidence scores that are not derivable from technical indicators. The core logic (comparing market price to fundamental value estimates with 15% threshold and confidence scoring ≥0.75) cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, pivots, volume ratios, returns). Fundamental value analysis requires external data inputs not available in the technical indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental value reversion strategy that cannot be meaningfully translated to a pure technical indicator ruleset. The signal explicitly requires: (1) fundamental value estimates from multiple independent analyses, (2) information source confidence scoring, and (3) multi-source validation. These are qualitative, external inputs. A technical-only approximation would lose the strategic intent entirely. Recommend implementing this signal with a custom fundamental analysis module separate from the technical backtest engine.
